Layers

Layers contain geospatial information displayed in the Map Viewer.

Layer Categories

Raster Layers

Examples:

  • Precipitation
  • Temperature
  • DEMs
  • Forecast products

Vector Layers

Examples:

  • Rivers
  • Basins
  • Stations
  • Infrastructure

Thematic Layers

Examples:

  • Flood maps
  • Drought indicators
  • Groundwater surfaces

Layer Controls

Function Description
Visibility Turn layers on/off
Opacity Adjust transparency
Legend View symbology
Ordering Reorder layers
Export Download layers

Related pages:

  • Base Maps
  • User Layers
